reviews.review_description:
I have Tripp, Maloka, etc and much prefer Novobeing. I find many of the presenters in the others to be quite grating but so far, the voices I have experienced here are soothing. The environments are beautifully done with lovely music. Love the humming breath!

Some notes:
Would like to be able to toggle on/off the voice guidance, the breath coach, the music and the ambient background. To be able to use any combination. Especially good once you have done a specific session a few times so don't have to listen to the same thing each time.

To have the stress meter actually prompt some response and/or feedback.

A menu of (health) concerns that will suggest different breathwork to use with a larger library of types. 

Classes or lectures on different wellness and mindfulness topics.

I'm sure I'll think of something else, but if this early access version is any indication, I trust the developers to come up with an amazing fleshed out finished product.

This free version is very effective even in it's limited offering and I truly hope that the developers will eventually be able to go a fully developed product.

My only ask is that it is a standalone payment with possible DLC additions and not a subscription..... I will happily purchase!

developer_response.body:
abi_and_papa - 

Wow - thank you so much for this thoughtful and generous review! 🌟 We’re truly honored that you prefer Novobeing and that the voices, music, and environments have been resonating with you. It’s wonderful to hear that the humming breath and overall design are supporting your practice.

Your feedback is incredibly valuable- customizing guidance and sound layers, making the stress meter more interactive, offering a broader breath-work library, and even adding lectures are all fantastic ideas. We’re constantly iterating, and insights like yours help us shape Novobeing into the best experience possible.

I also appreciate your note on pricing - we’ll be mindful as we grow to create options that are accessible and sustainable. If you think of anything else, or if you’d like to help co-create the next set of Novobeing experiences, I’d love to hear from you directly at [sid]at[novobeing][dot][com].

Thank you again for being part of this journey with us - it means the world! 🙏

reviews.review_description: Beautiful landscapes and well guided and interesting meditations. I look forward to making this part of my daily routine. Thank You

developer_response.body: HunterHugs - Thank you so much for your kind words! 🌸 We’re delighted to hear that you’re enjoying the landscapes and guided meditations, and that they’re becoming part of your daily routine. Your support truly means a lot to us. If you ever have suggestions or feedback to make the experience even better, feel free to reach me directly at [sid]at[novobeing][dot][com]. 🙏

reviews.review_title: Exactly what I was looking for
reviews.review_description: New to meta quest and tried different meditation games and there's too much talking and just wasn't for me. Till I stumbled across this. Absolutely perfect. If the devs do a subscription for more scenery or what have you, I'd sign up immediately. Music is ambient and just what I need at the end of the work day. Just perfect. Thank you!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words! 🌟 We’re so glad Novobeing was exactly what you were looking for and that the balance of music, scenery, and guidance feels right for you. 
We’re exploring ways to expand with more environments and options, so your feedback is very encouraging. If you’d like to share more ideas - or even help co-create the next experiences - feel free to reach us at [sid]at[novobeing][dot][com]. 🙏

reviews.review_description: This app is the best most soothing VR app on the market.    You will keep coming back to it.  Very well put together 💡

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words! 🌟 Hearing that it’s become part of your wellness routine means a lot. 

We’re exploring ways to expand with more environments and options, so your feedback is very encouraging. If you’d like to share more ideas - or even help co-create the next experiences - feel free to reach us at [sid]at[novobeing][dot][com] 🙏

reviews.review_description:
Novobeing has become my go-to virtual sanctuary for moments of tranquility and self-discovery. The graphics in this meditation app are nothing short of mesmerizing, creating a visually stunning environment that immediately transports you to a place of calm.

As a player, I appreciate how Novobeing has become a vital part of my daily routine, providing a break from the hectic pace of life. It's more than just a game; it's a holistic experience that promotes mental wellness.
🌈🌈🌈  Try NOVOBEING now &  you will love it   💫💫💫

Novobeing provides a surprisingly vivid and immersive experience, exceeding graphics expectations when considering that it's running natively on the Quest 2. The music and sound effects perfectly enhance the meditation atmosphere, complemented by narrators who strike the right balance between guidance and allowing time for reflection. The ability to interact, rather than just passively follow, adds a natural touch. My personal favorite is the Constellation meditation. It was the first one I tried, and it hooked me instantly, really making me excited for the others.

Novobeing is pretty user-friendly, but a few more explanations would be helpful. The stress meter, for instance, left me curious. Does it change anything? Also, a heads-up: swipe, don't drag, to navigate through meditations.

All in all, it's a fantastic blend of mindfulness and immersive tech. I'm looking forward to its future developments. Great work!

I thoroughly enjoyed using the NovoBeing application on my Meta Quest VR headset. The immersive experiences and diverse content provided a refreshing escape into virtual reality. The interface was user-friendly, and the app's performance was smooth. NovoBeing offers a unique blend of entertainment and relaxation, making it a must-have for VR enthusiasts seeking a well-rounded experience.

Novobeing is undoubtedly the best meditation app. Having tried apps like tripp, guided meditation, hoame and others, this one has no comparison. 
As a cognitive psychologist and experienced in working with professionals dealing with adhd, and personally being someone with adhd, the app had concrete results for me in less than two weeks. 

I went from not being able to meditate more than a few times a week to meditating up to 3 times a day, given the multisensory feedback provided by the app, plus very good guidance, immersive music and stunning environments. 
I think the potential of this app is huge, and I can't wait for new versions to be released. The interface is very easy to use and there is a good variety of meditations. Not downloading and using it would be crazy.

reviews.review_title: A Fun Way to Improve Your wellbeing
reviews.review_description: Novobeing is a VR well-being application that combines meditation, breathwork, music, and multisensory environments to help you achieve relaxation effortlessly. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a fun and effective way to improve their well-being.
The ultimate meditation app. It's hard to find a meditation app that works for me, but this one is free and helps me a lot.

I have been really enjoying exploring this app! And, I love the environments and the different types of breathwork available. 

I would love if the introductions could be skipped to get straight to the breathing, if you are familiar with the sessions. Also, if the breathe sessions themselves were also a bit longer that would be great too! The male voice, I think is an AI voice, but it is actually quite nice, although the way he says ‘calm’ is soo strange and jolts me out every time! I would also like to know how I get the class codes so I can participate in them too. 

But what a great app. I was looking for a VR breathwork app and here it is! Gorgeous!!

Novobeing has become one of my daily practices to center myself before the day. As someone who has attempted to meditate consistently and finds it challenging with daily distractions, Novobeing brings an incredibly immersive experience with amazing animations and sound to keep you engaged. The guided meditations are short and sweet, and is perfect to just drop in and get a quick 10 minute recharge for my day. While there are a bunch of things I haven't tried, I'm pretty satisfied with my experience so far. My favorite: The humming meditation!

The app is seamless, and you can get into breathwork in beautiful spaces within a matter of seconds, something I have struggled to find elsewhere. The graphics are awesome and the different levels of meditation are solid for addressing varying levels of stress, which I enjoyed. 

Can't wait to see what comes next and... devs, how do I reach out to suggest more features? Hit me up!

developer_response.body:
Hello Chhfast - Thank you for your review. You can email us at hello@novobeing.com to propose more features. We'd love to take them into account for our next release!

Also, while you're at it, fill in your info on novobeing.com/earlyaccess to keep updated on our product release updates!

reviews.review_description: Great music and visuals create believable worlds where i am happy to be. Move forward!

reviews.review_title: Great stress buster,  and mind re_boot
reviews.review_description:
Wow, really enjoy this app, fantastic breathing exercises and wonderful graphics.
I haven't. Missed a session yet, going on 40 days

developer_response.body: Mikeburridge- you're on quite a streak! We love it. I hope you continue enjoying our sessions. We are in the process of adding more; stay tuned! - Team Novobeing

reviews.review_description: This simple a great app with a good variety of class and sections of different meditation and calming classes. I would recommend u try the different sections and enjoy

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, ar_arohan. We are glad you enjoyed the diverse set of experiences we've made available for our users. Best, Team Novobeing :)

reviews.review_description: This is a great app for anyone who wants to get started or continue with a meditation practice. The programs are easy to follow and fun to interact with. Hand tracking makes the app more interesting and allows the user to feel more embodied during the practice. Will suggest to friends and family.

reviews.review_title: So many different ways to meditate
reviews.review_description:
Not only does this app relax me, but there are other environments and breathing practices that energize and even foster creativity. 

The variety of meditation styles presented is what separates Novobeing from the others. Calmness is the foundation, but it builds on top of the sense of grounding and space. 

And I love how there is actual activity done in the meditations, rather than just sitting there being passive. Meditation is about stillness, but one needs activity in order to appreciate and experience stillness: I feel this is the underlying message of Novobeing.

developer_response.body:
Kimproviser- our hearts melt when we read comments like this. We very much appreciate you giving Novobeing a try. We are still in the early stages of our journey, so your feedback is much appreciated.  Much gratitude from our whole team.

If you'd like to provide input to our next set of sessions currently under development, feel free to contact us at hello@novobeing.com. We look forward to supporting you in your inward journey.  - Novobeing team

reviews.review_description: Took this for a test drive. It was a very good way to relax after a stressful day. Highly recommend!

developer_response.body: Thank you for giving this app a test-drive. We always look for ways to improve the app, so if you have any more feedback, please email hello@novobeing.com or sign-up for product updates at novobeing.com/earlyaccess
